title: Contact Us
text:
Mailing Address:
Missile Defense Agency / Office Symbol
5700 18th Street, Bldg 245
Fort Belvoir, VA 22060-5573
Public Inquiries Email:
mda.info@mda.mil.
Media Relations Contact Information
For news media queries please contact us at:
The Missile Defense Agency responds to media requests and queries through our MDA Press Operations at MDAPressOperations@mda.mil.
This link is intended for requests from the media that do not require a response prior to the next business day.
Additional Contact Information
MDA Operational Status for Employees
(877) MDA EMER (877-632-3637)
508 Compliancy
The U.S. Department of Defense is committed to making its electronic and information technologies accessible to individuals with disabilities in accordance with Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act(external link opens in new window) (29 U.S.C. 794d), as amended in 1998.
Send feedback or concerns related to the accessibility of this website to the MDA Section 508 Coordinator.
For more information about Section 508, please visit the DoD Section 508 website(external link opens in new window).
Office of Small Business Programs
Missile Defense Agency
Office of Small Business Programs
Email: MissileDefenseAgencyOutreach@mda.mil
MDA Solicitations and Contracts
Please direct questions regarding a specific contract or solicitation to the point of contact indicated for that acquisition. For general questions please send your inquiries to Competition_Advocate@mda.mil.
STEM Outreach
Are you a teacher, parent, or student seeking additional information about our programs and the STEM career fields? Please email us at STEM@mda.mil for more information about our STEM outreach programs and the STEM career fields.
MDA Fraud, Waste, and Abuse Hotline
MDA Fraud, Waste, and Abuse Hotline
DoD Inspector General (IG) Fraud, Waste, and Abuse Hotline
(800) 424-9098
http://www.dodig.mil/hotline/(external link opens in new window)
Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
For questions and assistance with MDA FOIA please go here for further contact information.
MDA Privacy Office
For MDA Privacy Questions or Suggestions and for Requests to Access or Amend Your MDA Records Containing Privacy Information:
MDA Privacy Office
Phone: (256) 313-9900
Email: MDAPrivacyOffice@mda.mil
For Senior DoD Official for Privacy:
Ms. Joo Chung
Phone: (703) 571-007
Human Resources
For inquiries about your application please contact the Defense Logistics Agency:
Defense Logistics Agency
DHRC-D, DLA Human Resources Center - DoD
Attn: MDA Team
P.O. Box 182560
Columbus, OH 43218-2560
